chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1827 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 13.04.2022 Mr. Faisal Nadeem Abro, advocate for petitioner *** Petitioner has challenged the two orders of Senior Civil Judge and VIth Additional Sessions Judge Hyderabad on the count that the legal heirs of the co-owners, who have expired, have not been impleaded. It appears that on the count of surrendered deed, petitioner is seeking exclusion of those co-sharers. We are not impressed by the statement that they have executed surrendered deed, which is unregistered. Unless they appear before the Court and give a statement on Oath, they (co-owners) cannot be excluded by the petitioner from seeking a declaration with regard to the property in question. No interference is required. The petition is dismissed accordingly alongwith listed applications with cost of Rs.5,000/-. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
